title: space-ml-sim: Simulation Framework for AI Inference on Orbital Satellite Constellations
description: A simulation framework for studying the effects of space radiation on AI inference running aboard orbital satellite constellations. Features SPENVIS-validated radiation models, ML-aware fault injection into PyTorch/ONNX models, TMR fault tolerance, distributed inference across inter-satellite links, ground station scheduling, link-budget analysis, and ECSS/MIL-STD-compliant mission report generation.
